what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links the design-source channel to an image asset identified as p-45 under recent-pitches, with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata block with no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/recent-pitches/p-45
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Uses a channel-memory id prefix att-
Target uses a custom image:// URI scheme
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger entry that records an image attachment tied to the design-source channel and a recent pitch image identifier.
questions: What does p-45 represent or depict?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Does the target image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-45 actually resolve to an asset?
Is there a caption, title, or MIME type for the image?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to record an image attachment reference, and its content does exactly that.
intention_signals: To create a durable, dated reference associating a design-source channel with a specific pitch image asset.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme to address channel-local image assets rather than a filesystem path or HTTP URL.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, timestamped attachment record that links a channel to an image asset, supporting traceability of design-source pitch imagery in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-169d236e linking the design-source channel to image asset p-45 in recent-pitches with an added ISO timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a dated reference to a pitch image attached to the design-source channel.
